What We Offer

Our Services

From finding your ideal pre-owned car to renting for a day — Shree Ji Motors is your complete automotive partner in Greater Noida.

🚗
Used Car Sales

Browse our carefully curated inventory of pre-owned vehicles from top brands. Every car is inspected, verified, and priced fairly — no hidden surprises.

🔄
Car Exchange

Upgrade your ride without the hassle. Get the best valuation for your current car and exchange it directly for a better one from our stock.

Instant Quote Fair Value Same Day

🏷️
Sell Your Car

Get the best price for your used car. We offer a transparent evaluation process and immediate payment — no waiting, no middlemen.

Car Rental

Well-maintained cars available for daily, weekly, and monthly rentals. Perfect for business trips, outstation travel, or local commuting needs.

Why Choose Us

TrustedBy Customers in Delhi NCR

🛡️
100% Verified

Every car undergoes thorough inspection. Clear RC, no loan dues, genuine odometer — guaranteed.

💰
Best Price

Competitive market pricing with zero hidden charges. What you see is what you pay — always.

📋
Full Documentation

We handle RC transfer, insurance, and all paperwork so you don't have to worry about anything.

🤝
Trusted Partner

500+ happy customers across Greater Noida, Noida, and Delhi NCR trust us for their car needs.

🏦
Loan Assistance

Easy finance options. We work with leading banks and NBFCs to get you the best EMI deals.

📍
Prime Location

Conveniently located at The Hemisphere Galleria, Alpha-2, Greater Noida — easy to find, easy to visit.

🔧
After-Sale Support

Our relationship doesn't end at sale. We're here for service guidance and assistance even after purchase.

⚡
Quick Process

Fast valuation, same-day deals. We respect your time and make the buying or selling process smooth.
